bh.shot_strategy: For Hole 1 (Yellow) with a 1 o'clock wind, throw a controlled RHBH with an overstable fairway driver to combat the leftward push, avoiding the water OB to the right.

fh.shot_strategy: For Hole 1 (White) with a 12 o'clock headwind, a stable fairway driver thrown RHFH with a hyzer flip will be effective, aiming to stay out of the water OB.

bh.shot_strategy: For Hole 1 (Blue) with a 12 o'clock headwind, use a stable fairway driver on a LHBH line, ensuring you give it enough power to clear the water OB.

fh.shot_strategy: On Hole 1 (Blue), the 12 o'clock headwind calls for an understable fairway driver on a LHFH, aiming for a smooth flight path that avoids the water OB.
